data.title: Novaturas Announces Changes in Chief Financial Officer Position
data.description: Novaturas Group has recently revealed a shakeup in its leadership team, with Chief Financial Officer Auksė Kriaučiūnaitė set to resign from her role on March 27. The company is actively seeking a replacement to fill this key position.

data.title: SalMar – Integrated annual report 2025
data.description: On Thursday, March 26, 2026, the board approved the final financial statement for the year 2025, as indicated in the stock exchange notice. This approval marks a significant milestone for the company, showcasing its financial performance and results for the year. Shareholders and investors can now review the detailed financial figures for 2025, which include key metrics such as revenue, profit, expenses, and other important financial indicators. The approved financial statement provides transparency and insight into the company's financial health and stability, offering valuable information to stakeholders. This announcement underscores the commitment to financial reporting accuracy and timeliness, reinforcing trust and confidence in the company's operations and management.

data.title: Convocation of ordinary general meeting of 29 April 2026
data.description: Real estate investment company Vastned (Vastned NV) has announced the scheduling of its annual general meeting for shareholders, set to take place on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 2:30 pm. The meeting will be held at the company's headquarters located at Generaal Lemanstraat 61, 2018 Antwerp. Vastned is listed on both Euronext Brussels and Euronext Amsterdam under the ticker symbol VASTB.

data.title: Chainlink could reach $9.25 - currently at $8.89 with RSI at 46.34. Bearish MACD signals caution.
data.description: The cryptocurrency LINK is currently trading at $8.89, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 46.34. According to technical analysis, there is a potential for the price to recover to the $9.25 resistance level. However, bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator suggest caution for the short-term outlook.

data.title: AVAX expected to reach $10.50 by April, showing signs of recovery with RSI at 43.80. Support at $9.
data.description: Evidence indicates that AVAX may have reached a low point around the $9 mark, supported by a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 43.80. Analysis indicates a possible rebound towards the $10.50 resistance level if the current support remains steady until the beginning of April.

data.title: Polkadot's DOT trades at $1.32, eyes $1.40 resistance. Bears at $1.28. RSI at 37.26 hints at possible turnaround.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DOT is currently trading at $1.32 per token, showing mixed technical signals. The bulls are aiming to break through the resistance level of $1.40, while the bears are closely monitoring the support level at $1.28. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at a neutral value of 37.26, indicating a possible upcoming reversal in the market trend.

data.title: Solana aims for $95 rebound despite hurdles, $88 resistance key, $80 support crucial. Bulls target $95-$100, bears watch for $80 breakdown.
data.description: SOL is currently facing a significant challenge at the $88 resistance level, with technical indicators showing a mixed outlook. If the bullish scenario plays out, the price may target the range of $95-$100. On the other hand, bears are monitoring the possibility of a breakdown below the $80 support level.
